title: Lasjia erecta
taxonomy: Lasjia erecta is classified within the plant family Pteridaceae, commonly known as the fern family. This plant belongs to the order Pteridales and class Polypodiopsida. Lasjia erecta is also a species of fern that is native to tropical regions of Asia. Its classification is further supported by its morphological characteristics, such as its erect growth habit and pinnate leaf structure. The classification of Lasjia erecta reflects its evolutionary relationships with other fern species within the Pteridaceae family.
